description:
§16.4 — a caller passing unslotted children to a component whose body has no unnamed spread SHALL fire E-COMPONENT-031. `Card`'s body has only `${render header()}` (a named snippet render, not a spread); the use site passes a `slot="header"` child (fine) AND an unslotted `

stray

` (has nowhere to go). Reject (pos) half of the E-COMPONENT-031 pin; clean neg is components/unslotted-children-no-spread-clean.
rationale:
§16.4: 'If no spread exists and the caller provides unslotted children, this is E-COMPONENT-021 [impl#1: E-COMPONENT-031 — see the sPA-ss68 escalation report for the §16.4-vs-impl code-number divergence].' `Card` declares no `${...}`/`${children}` spread, so the unslotted `

stray

` child has no fill-site to flow into.
